name: ChatGPT: Projects
summary: List ChatGPT Projects (gizmo g-p-*) or list the conversations inside one project, via the same backend-api JSON the web app uses.
description: Discover ChatGPT Projects and their chats. mode=list (default) returns every project (id, name, short_url, ready-to-use project_url, recent_conversation_count) — chat ids are NOT embedded. mode=conversations + project_id returns that project's conversations (chat_id, title, snippet, timestamps, gizmo_id). Pair with chatgpt_read (read any returned chat_id) and chatgpt_send --param project_id=... (post a new chat into the project).

help.summary: List ChatGPT Projects, or the conversations within a project.

examples.description: List all projects with their recent conversations.

examples.command: rzn-browser run chatgpt projects --param mode="conversations" --param project_id="g-p-6a1cf704378c81918cd8bc23d867e23a" --param limit="20"
examples.description: List the 20 most recent conversations in one project.

parameters.mode: `list` (default) = all projects + recent conversations each. `conversations` = one project's conversations (requires project_id).
parameters.project_id: Project gizmo id (g-p-...), short_url, or full /g/.../project URL. Required when mode=conversations.
parameters.limit: Max conversations per project (list mode) or total (conversations mode). Default 10.

notes: Projects are gizmos with id prefix g-p-. Listing uses /backend-api/gizmos/snorlax/sidebar; per-project conversations use /backend-api/gizmos/{id}/conversations.

Returned chat_id values are ordinary conversation ids — read them with chatgpt_read and reply with chatgpt_send (set project_id to keep the reply in the project, or pass chat_id to continue the specific thread).

mode.description: `list` (default) lists all projects with recent conversations; `conversations` lists one project's conversations (needs project_id).

project_id.description: Project gizmo id (g-p-...), short_url, or full /g/.../project URL. Required when mode=conversations.

limit.description: Max conversations per project (list) or total (conversations). Default 10.

steps.name: Open ChatGPT to inherit the authenticated session
Allow the SPA shell + cookies to settle

inputs.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const modeRaw=cleanArg(arg0).toLowerCase();const mode=(modeRaw==='conversations'||modeRaw==='convos')?'conversations':'list';const projectArg=cleanArg(arg1);let limit=parseInt(cleanArg(arg2),10);if(!Number.isFinite(limit)||limit<=0)limit=10;const ses=await fetch('/api/auth/session',{credentials:'include'}).then(r=>r.json()).catch(()=>({}));const token=ses&&ses.accessToken;if(!token)throw new Error('No accessToken in /api/auth/session — not logged in?');const H={'Authorization':'Bearer '+token,'Accept':'application/json'};const jget=async(u)=>{const r=await fetch(u,{headers:H,credentials:'include'});if(!r.ok)throw new Error('GET '+u+' -> '+r.status);return r.json();};const extractPid=(s)=>{const m=String(s||'').match(/g-p-[a-z0-9]+/i);return m?m[0]:'';};const projUrl=(g)=>'https://chatgpt.com/g/'+(g.short_url||g.id)+'/project';if(mode==='list'){const data=await jget('/backend-api/gizmos/snorlax/sidebar?conversations_per_gizmo='+limit);const items=(data&&data.items)||[];const projects=items.map(it=>{const g=(it.gizmo&&it.gizmo.gizmo)||{};const disp=(it.gizmo&&it.gizmo.display)||{};const recent=((it.conversations&&it.conversations.items)||[]).length;return {project_id:g.id||null,short_url:g.short_url||null,name:disp.name||(g.display&&g.display.name)||null,project_url:projUrl(g),recent_conversation_count:recent};});return {mode:'list',url:location.href,project_count:projects.length,projects,note:'Use mode=conversations --param project_id=<id> to list chat_ids in a project.'};}else{const pid=extractPid(projectArg)||projectArg;if(!pid)throw new Error('project_id is required for mode=conversations');const data=await jget('/backend-api/gizmos/'+encodeURIComponent(pid)+'/conversations?limit='+limit);const items=(data&&(data.items||data.conversations))||[];const conversations=items.map(c=>({chat_id:c.id||c.conversation_id||null,title:c.title||null,create_time:c.create_time||null,update_time:c.update_time||null,snippet:c.snippet||null,gizmo_id:c.gizmo_id||pid}));return {mode:'conversations',url:location.href,project_id:pid,conversation_count:conversations.length,cursor:(data&&data.cursor)||null,conversations};}

steps.name: Fetch projects (gizmo sidebar) or a project's conversations
